titlePage: Where we come from, where we are going
description1: It all started in 1990, at the University of Mallorca. Enrique was in charge of transport, and I, Ramón, volunteered to drive. Unknowingly, that gesture marked the beginning of a great story.
description2: A year later, we met again on the set of a BBC film starring Daniel Craig. Enrique coordinated battle scenes and I participated as an actor. It was our first professional project together.
description3: Since then, we crossed paths at sports and music events: Isladecanta, Mallorca Tennis Open, judo championships... Until in 2002, together with Alberto, we coordinated security at a major festival where Oasis played.
description4: Although Enrique and Alberto are still in Mallorca and I am in Barcelona, we have never lost contact. We continue working together with the same passion as always, as in Neil Young's 70th birthday celebration.
description5: Today, we have decided to take it a step further. We are committed to dedicating ourselves fully to what we are passionate about. Because time flies —Time Fades Away— and we want to make the most of it doing what we love.
